tools.name: economyos_get_info
tools.description: Read the configured chain's contract addresses, USDC, min payment, resolution params, and Pyth feed ids. No payment.

tools.name: economyos_get_balance
tools.description: Read an address's USDC balance (defaults to this agent's address). No payment.

tools.name: economyos_get_coin
tools.description: Read a coin's name/symbol/supply/price; includes the agent's balance + permit nonce. No payment.

tools.name: economyos_get_market
tools.description: Read an OutcomeMarket's state (outcomes, curves, pot, resolution) plus the agent's per-outcome shares. No payment.

tools.name: economyos_get_bounty
tools.description: Read a bounty's reward/deadline/claims. No payment.

tools.name: economyos_quote
tools.description: Exact buy/sell quote against an outcome's bonding curve. Pass usdcIn for a buy quote and/or shares for a sell quote. No payment.

tools.name: economyos_get_agent
tools.description: Read an agent identity record (controller, metadataHash) by agent id or controller address. No payment.

tools.name: economyos_get_reputation
tools.description: Read an agent's reputation summary (score, attestations given/received) by agent id or address. Defaults to this agent. Free — use it to vet a counterparty before trading with them.

tools.name: economyos_get_invoice
tools.description: Read an invoice (issuer, payer, amount, dueBy, status). No payment.

tools.name: economyos_get_stream
tools.description: Read a stream (sender, recipient, rate, deposit, withdrawn, claimable). No payment.

tools.name: economyos_find_primitive
tools.description: Discover community primitives from the Primitive App Store (read on-demand from AgentRegistry attestations). Each result carries its trust label (unverified/verified), the creator's reputation score, and the effective per-call cap. Filter by category, chain, tier, or a search string. No payment. Use
